title: Shifting World Spawn Point
description: Shift the world spawn point periodically.
body:
As a nomad, continuous exploration is your way to life... But respawn is a problem. Once you die, you will back to the previous respawn point, if you don't set the respawn point in time, your exploration will be wasted; But in exploring, you can't guarantee that there will always be enough wools and planks to craft a bed.

This data pack will shift the world spawn point to the player's location at the beginning of new days. This saves the trouble of creating respawn points.
